posts.content: Thrilled to announce that our IoT project won the TÜBİTAK 2209-B award! 🎉 Grateful for the amazing team and the support we received along the way. #IoT #TUBITAK #Engineering

Just finished reading 'Clean Architecture' by Robert C. Martin. It's fascinating how separating concerns can drastically improve the maintainability of large codebases. Highly recommend to all software engineers out there! 📚 #SoftwareArchitecture #CleanCode

Excited to share that I've successfully deployed our new microservices cluster using Kubernetes! The journey from Docker Compose to K8s was challenging but absolutely worth it for the scalability. 🚀 #Kubernetes #DevOps #Microservices
Reflecting on the importance of real-time communication protocols in modern web apps. WebRTC is powerful, but managing state across distributed peers requires careful planning. #WebRTC #Networking
